case_title: GRAND CENTRAL ANSWERING SERVICE VS BLUE, JOE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $377.55 FILED BY GRAND CENTRAL ANSWERING SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE, JOE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
